jump_landing_label: {platformer_short_arc_rule_text} Which labeled platform will the character land on?
Extrapolate the dashed jump arc from the character. {platformer_short_arc_rule_text} What is the label of the landing platform?
{platformer_short_arc_rule_text} Report the label on the platform reached by the jump.
The character follows the dashed arc direction. Which labeled platform is reached?
{platformer_short_arc_rule_text} Identify the labeled platform where the jump ends.
collectible_count: {platformer_full_arc_rule_text} How many coins lie on that arc?
Follow the dashed jump arc. {platformer_full_arc_rule_text} Count the coins on the arc.
{platformer_full_arc_rule_text} Report the number of coins that the character would collect.
The character follows the dashed arc. How many coins are on the path?
{platformer_full_arc_rule_text} Count only the coins lying on the dashed arc.
jump_collectible_score_value: {platformer_full_arc_rule_text} {platformer_score_rule_text} What is the total score from collectibles centered on the dashed arc?
Follow the dashed jump arc. {platformer_score_rule_text} Add only collectibles whose centers lie on that arc.
{platformer_score_rule_text} Report the total score from dashed-arc collectibles, ignoring all off-arc items.
{platformer_full_arc_rule_text} {platformer_score_rule_text} Count only collectibles centered on the dashed arc and compute their total score.
{platformer_score_rule_text} The character follows the dashed arc. What score is collected from collectibles on that path?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_side_scroller: a side-scroller platformer level with a player character, platforms, hazards, coins, bonus items, and a dashed jump arc
code_prompt_defaults.platformer_short_arc_rule_text: The dashed arc shows the first part of the jump; extend the same smooth arc forward.
code_prompt_defaults.platformer_full_arc_rule_text: The dashed arc shows the jump path to follow.
code_prompt_defaults.platformer_score_rule_text: Coins score 1; bonus items score their printed value. Count only collectibles whose centers lie on the dashed arc. Ignore hazards and all collectibles away from the dashed arc.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_jump_landing_label: set "annotation" to one bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] around the labeled platform where the jump lands
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_jump_landing_label: set "answer" to the selected platform label as a string
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_collectible_count: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of each coin lying on the dashed jump arc
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_collectible_count: set "answer" to the number of coins lying on the dashed jump arc as an integer
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_jump_collectible_score_v: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of each coin or printed-value bonus item included in the dashed-arc score
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_jump_collectible_score_value: set "answer" to the integer total score from collectibles centered on the dashed jump arc
